author: yhny1001
description: Dynamic memory for TauriTavern. Auto-compresses prompt to the most recent N real-dialog turns (character preset blocks like <overall-rules> / <writing-guidelines> / <now-player-input> are isolated from the recentTurns quota). Each request also runs a smart pre-grep on the latest user input via chat.current.handle().searchMessages, filters hits to the out-of-window range, and injects up to top-3 snippets into a 【早期相关片段】 block in system. Skips silently when query is too short or all hits are already in-window. Agent Mode additionally appends a [#X] citation requirement and a slim retrieval protocol that lets the agent self-issue chat.search / chat.read_messages (max_chars hard limit 8000 per backend) when the pre-grep snippet is not enough.
